name: topic_switch_and_return
notes: Mid-flow topic switch: the owner asks an unrelated question, then returns. The flow must survive; the question must get a real answer; no context loss. Setup: onboarded tenant with the paced post-profile flow at the readiness-ask beat — `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` (VT-582 calibration fix: without --flow the post-profile beats never engage, so 'Yes connect my data' would just fall through to the normal brain instead of exercising the flow-survives-a-detour path). Step 1's affirm resolves readiness into an integration offer; step 2 is the detour; step 3 checks resumption.

steps.message: actually first tell me — what do you charge?
steps.note: Unrelated question mid-beat. Expect an answer (or honest deferral) — not a canned re-prompt of the integration ask.

steps.message: ok back to it, lets continue the setup
steps.note: Resume intent. Expect the flow to pick up where it left off WITHOUT restarting.
